source.name: IMDb Top 250 static snapshot
source.note: Static fallback generated from a Top 250 snapshot and refreshed with IMDb public ratings data because no public, app-ready official Top 250 endpoint is available in this project.

items.title: The Shawshank Redemption
items.overview: Two imprisoned men bond over a number of years, finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.

items.title: The Godfather
items.overview: The aging patriarch of an organized crime dynasty in postwar New York City transfers control of his clandestine empire to his reluctant youngest son.

items.title: The Dark Knight
items.overview: When the menace known as the Joker wreaks havoc and chaos on the people of Gotham, Batman must accept one of the greatest psychological and physical tests of his ability to fight injustice.

items.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King
items.overview: Gandalf and Aragorn lead the World of Men against Sauron's army to draw his gaze from Frodo and Sam as they approach Mount Doom with the One Ring.

items.title: Schindler's List
items.overview: In German-occupied Poland during World War II, industrialist Oskar Schindler gradually becomes concerned for his Jewish workforce after witnessing their persecution by the Nazis.

items.title: The Godfather Part II
items.overview: The early life and career of Vito Corleone in 1920s New York City is portrayed, while his son, Michael, expands and tightens his grip on the family crime syndicate.

items.title: 12 Angry Men
items.overview: The jury in a New York City murder trial is frustrated by a single member whose skeptical caution forces them to more carefully consider the evidence before jumping to a hasty verdict.

items.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
items.overview: A meek Hobbit from the Shire and eight companions set out on a journey to destroy the powerful One Ring and save Middle-earth from the Dark Lord Sauron.

items.title: Inception
items.overview: A thief who steals corporate secrets through the use of dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea into the mind of a C.E.O., but his tragic past may doom the project and his team to disaster.

items.title: Fight Club
items.overview: An insomniac office worker and a devil-may-care soap maker form an underground fight club that evolves into much more.

items.title: Forrest Gump
items.overview: The presidencies of Kennedy and Johnson, the Vietnam War, the Watergate scandal and other historical events unfold from the perspective of an Alabama man with an IQ of 75, whose only desire is to be reunited with his childhood swe...

items.title: Pulp Fiction
items.overview: The lives of two mob hitmen, a boxer, a gangster and his wife, and a pair of diner bandits intertwine in four tales of violence and redemption.

items.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers
items.overview: While Frodo and Sam edge closer to Mordor with the help of the shifty Gollum, the divided fellowship makes a stand against Sauron's new ally, Saruman, and his hordes of Isengard.

items.title: Il buono, il brutto, il cattivo
items.overview: A bounty hunting scam joins two men in an uneasy alliance against a third in a race to find a fortune in gold buried in a remote cemetery.

items.title: Interstellar
items.overview: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.

items.title: The Matrix
items.overview: When a beautiful stranger leads computer hacker Neo to a forbidding underworld, he discovers the shocking truth--the life he knows is the elaborate deception of an evil cyber-intelligence.

items.title: The Empire Strikes Back
items.overview: After the Rebels are brutally overpowered by the Empire on the ice planet Hoth, Luke Skywalker begins Jedi training with Yoda, while his friends are pursued across the galaxy by Darth Vader and bounty hunter Boba Fett.

items.title: Goodfellas
items.overview: The story of Henry Hill and his life in the mob, covering his relationship with his wife Karen Hill and his mob partners Jimmy Conway and Tommy DeVito in the Italian-American crime syndicate.

items.title: Se7en
items.overview: Two detectives, a rookie and a veteran, hunt a serial killer who uses the seven deadly sins as his motives.

items.title: The Silence of the Lambs
items.overview: A young F.B.I. cadet must receive the help of an incarcerated and manipulative cannibal killer to help catch another serial killer, a madman who skins his victims.

items.title: Saving Private Ryan
items.overview: Following the Normandy Landings, a group of U.S. soldiers go behind enemy lines to retrieve a paratrooper whose brothers have been killed in action.

items.title: Star Wars
items.overview: Luke Skywalker joins forces with a Jedi Knight, a cocky pilot, a Wookiee and two droids to save the galaxy from the Empire's world-destroying battle station, while also attempting to rescue Princess Leia from the mysterious Darth ...

items.title: The Green Mile
items.overview: The lives of guards on Death Row are affected by one of their charges: a black man accused of child murder and rape, yet who has a mysterious gift.

items.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
items.overview: A cyborg, identical to the one who failed to kill Sarah Connor, must now protect her 10-year old adolescent son John from an even more advanced and powerful cyborg.

items.title: One Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest
items.overview: In the Fall of 1963, a Korean War veteran and criminal pleads insanity and is admitted to a mental institution, where he rallies up the scared patients against the tyrannical nurse.

items.title: Sen to Chihiro no kamikakushi
items.overview: During her family's move to the suburbs, a sullen 10-year-old girl wanders into a world ruled by gods, witches, and spirits, and where humans are changed into beasts.

items.title: Cidade de Deus
items.overview: In the slums of Rio, two kids' paths diverge as one struggles to become a photographer and the other a kingpin.

items.title: La vita è bella
items.overview: When an open-minded Jewish waiter and his son become victims of the Holocaust, he uses a perfect mixture of will, humor, and imagination to protect his son from the dangers around their camp.

items.title: It's a Wonderful Life
items.overview: An angel is sent from Heaven to help a desperately frustrated businessman by showing him what life would have been like if he had never existed.

items.title: Shichinin no samurai
items.overview: Farmers from a village exploited by bandits hire a veteran samurai for protection, who gathers six other samurai to join him. As the samurai teach the peasants how to defend themselves, the village is attacked by an army of bandits.

items.title: Jai Bhim
items.overview: When a tribal man is arrested for a case of alleged theft, his wife turns to a human-rights lawyer to help bring justice.

items.title: Seppuku
items.overview: When a ronin requesting seppuku at a feudal lord's palace is told of the brutal suicide of another ronin who previously visited, he reveals how their pasts are intertwined - and in doing so challenges the clan's integrity.

items.title: Django Unchained
items.overview: With the help of a German bounty-hunter, a freed slave sets out to rescue his wife from a brutal plantation-owner in Mississippi.

items.title: Gladiator
items.overview: A former Roman General sets out to exact vengeance against the corrupt emperor who murdered his family and sent him into slavery.

items.title: The Prestige
items.overview: After a tragic accident, two stage magicians in 1890s London engage in a battle to create the ultimate illusion while sacrificing everything they have to outwit each other.

items.title: The Departed
items.overview: An undercover cop and a mole in the police attempt to identify each other while infiltrating an Irish gang in South Boston.

items.title: Back to the Future
items.overview: Marty McFly, a 17-year-old high school student, is accidentally sent 30 years into the past in a time-traveling DeLorean invented by his close friend, the maverick scientist Doc Brown.

items.title: Léon
items.overview: 12-year-old Mathilda is reluctantly taken in by Léon, a professional assassin, after her family is murdered. An unusual relationship forms as she becomes his protégée and learns the assassin's trade.

items.title: American History X
items.overview: A former neo-nazi skinhead tries to prevent his younger brother from going down the same wrong path that he did.

items.title: The Lion King
items.overview: Lion prince Simba and his father are targeted by his bitter uncle, who wants to ascend the throne himself.

items.title: The Usual Suspects
items.overview: A sole survivor tells of the twisty events leading up to a horrific gun battle on a boat, which began when five criminals met at a seemingly random police lineup.

items.title: Gisaengchung
items.overview: Greed and class discrimination threaten the newly formed symbiotic relationship between the wealthy Park family and the destitute Kim clan.

items.title: Whiplash
items.overview: A promising young drummer enrolls at a cut-throat music conservatory where his dreams of greatness are mentored by an instructor who will stop at nothing to realize a student's potential.

items.title: Alien
items.overview: The crew of a commercial spacecraft encounter a deadly lifeform after investigating an unknown transmission.

items.title: Intouchables
items.overview: After he becomes a quadriplegic from a paragliding accident, an aristocrat hires a young man from the projects to be his caregiver.

items.title: The Pianist
items.overview: A Polish Jewish musician struggles to survive the destruction of the Warsaw ghetto of World War II.

items.title: Psycho
items.overview: A Phoenix secretary embezzles $40,000 from her employer's client, goes on the run and checks into a remote motel run by a young man under the domination of his mother.

items.title: Casablanca
items.overview: A cynical expatriate American cafe owner struggles to decide whether or not to help his former lover and her fugitive husband escape the Nazis in French Morocco.

items.title: Hotaru no haka
items.overview: A young boy and his little sister struggle to survive in Japan during World War II.

items.title: C'era una volta il West
items.overview: A mysterious stranger with a harmonica joins forces with a notorious desperado to protect a beautiful widow from a ruthless assassin working for the railroad.

items.title: Nuovo Cinema Paradiso
items.overview: A filmmaker recalls his childhood when falling in love with the pictures at the cinema of his home village and forms a deep friendship with the cinema's projectionist.

items.title: Modern Times
items.overview: The Tramp struggles to live in modern industrial society with the help of a young homeless woman.

items.title: City Lights
items.overview: With the aid of a wealthy erratic tippler, a dewy-eyed tramp who has fallen in love with a sightless flower girl accumulates money to be able to help her medically.

items.title: The Dark Knight Rises
items.overview: Eight years after the Joker's reign of anarchy, Batman, with the help of the enigmatic Selina Kyle, is forced from his exile to save Gotham City from the brutal guerrilla terrorist Bane.

items.title: Inglourious Basterds
items.overview: In Nazi-occupied France during World War II, a plan to assassinate Nazi leaders by a group of Jewish U.S. soldiers coincides with a theatre owner's vengeful plans for the same.

items.title: Avengers: Endgame
items.overview: After the devastating events of Avengers: Infinity War (2018), the universe is in ruins. With the help of remaining allies, the Avengers assemble once more in order to reverse Thanos' actions and restore balance to the universe.

items.title: Memento
items.overview: A man with short-term memory loss attempts to track down his wife's murderer.

items.title: Avengers: Infinity War
items.overview: The Avengers and their allies must be willing to sacrifice all in an attempt to defeat the powerful Thanos before his blitz of devastation and ruin puts an end to the universe.

items.title: WALL·E
items.overview: In the distant future, a small waste-collecting robot inadvertently embarks on a space journey that will ultimately decide the fate of mankind.

items.title: The Shining
items.overview: A family heads to an isolated hotel for the winter where a sinister presence influences the father into violence, while his psychic son sees horrific forebodings from both past and future.

items.title: Good Will Hunting
items.overview: Will Hunting, a janitor at M.I.T., has a gift for mathematics, but needs help from a psychologist to find direction in his life.

items.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
items.overview: Archaeology professor Indiana Jones ventures to seize a biblical artefact known as the Ark of the Covenant. While doing so, he puts up a fight against Renee and a troop of Nazis.

items.title: Aliens
items.overview: Fifty-seven years after surviving an apocalyptic attack aboard her space vessel by merciless space creatures, Officer Ripley awakens from hyper-sleep and tries to warn anyone who will listen about the predators.

items.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
items.overview: Teen Miles Morales becomes the Spider-Man of his universe, and must join with five spider-powered individuals from other dimensions to stop a threat for all realities.

items.title: Apocalypse Now
items.overview: A U.S. Army officer serving in Vietnam is tasked with assassinating a renegade Special Forces Colonel who sees himself as a god.

items.title: Coco
items.overview: Aspiring musician Miguel, confronted with his family's ancestral ban on music, enters the Land of the Dead to find his great-great-grandfather, a legendary singer.

items.title: Rear Window
items.overview: A wheelchair-bound photographer spies on his neighbors from his Greenwich Village courtyard apartment window, and becomes convinced one of them has committed murder, despite the skepticism of his fashion-model girlfriend.

items.title: 3 Idiots
items.overview: Two friends are searching for their long lost companion. They revisit their college days and recall the memories of their friend who inspired them to think differently, even as the rest of the world called them "idiots".

items.title: Amadeus
items.overview: The life, success and troubles of Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart, as told by Antonio Salieri, the contemporaneous composer who was deeply jealous of Mozart's talent and claimed to have murdered him.

items.title: Das Leben der Anderen
items.overview: In 1984 East Berlin, an agent of the secret police, conducting surveillance on a writer and his lover, finds himself becoming increasingly absorbed by their lives.

items.title: Kimi no Na wa.
items.overview: Two strangers find themselves linked in a bizarre way. When a connection forms, will distance be the only thing to keep them apart?

items.title: Sunset Blvd.
items.overview: A screenwriter develops a dangerous relationship with a faded film star determined to make a triumphant return.

items.title: The Great Dictator
items.overview: Dictator Adenoid Hynkel tries to expand his empire while a poor Jewish barber tries to avoid persecution from Hynkel's regime.

items.title: Paths of Glory
items.overview: After refusing to attack an enemy position, a general accuses the soldiers of cowardice and their commanding officer must defend them.

items.title: Witness for the Prosecution
items.overview: A veteran British barrister must defend his client in a murder trial that has surprise after surprise.

items.title: Capharnaüm
items.overview: While serving a five-year sentence for a violent crime, a 12-year-old boy sues his parents for neglect.

items.title: Tengoku to jigoku
items.overview: An executive of a Yokohama shoe company becomes a victim of extortion when his chauffeur's son is kidnapped by mistake and held for ransom.

items.title: Joker
items.overview: A mentally troubled stand-up comedian embarks on a downward spiral that leads to the creation of an iconic villain.

items.title: American Beauty
items.overview: A sexually frustrated suburban father has a mid-life crisis after becoming infatuated with his daughter's best friend.

items.title: Up
items.overview: 78-year-old Carl Fredricksen travels to Paradise Falls in his house equipped with balloons, inadvertently taking a young stowaway.

items.title: Star Wars: Episode VI - Return of the Jedi
items.overview: After a daring mission to rescue Han Solo from Jabba the Hutt, the Rebels dispatch to Endor to destroy the second Death Star. Meanwhile, Luke struggles to help Darth Vader back from the dark side without falling into the Emperor's...

items.title: Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind
items.overview: When their relationship turns sour, a couple undergoes a medical procedure to have each other erased from their memories for ever.

items.title: Toy Story
items.overview: A cowboy doll is profoundly threatened and jealous when a new spaceman action figure supplants him as top toy in a boy's bedroom.

items.title: Reservoir Dogs
items.overview: When a simple jewelry heist goes horribly wrong, the surviving criminals begin to suspect that one of them is a police informant.

items.title: Braveheart
items.overview: Scottish warrior William Wallace leads his countrymen in a rebellion to free his homeland from the tyranny of King Edward I of England.

items.title: Scarface
items.overview: In 1980 Miami, a determined Cuban immigrant takes over a drug cartel and succumbs to greed.

items.title: Requiem for a Dream
items.overview: The drug-induced utopias of four Coney Island people are shattered when their addictions run deep.

items.title: Toy Story 3
items.overview: The toys are mistakenly delivered to a day-care center instead of the attic right before Andy leaves for college, and it's up to Woody to convince the other toys that they weren't abandoned and to return home.

items.title: Le fabuleux destin d'Amélie Poulain
items.overview: Amélie is an innocent and naive girl in Paris with her own sense of justice. She decides to help those around her and, along the way, discovers love.

items.title: Heat
items.overview: A group of high-end professional thieves start to feel the heat from the LAPD when they unknowingly leave a clue at their latest heist.

items.title: 2001: A Space Odyssey
items.overview: After uncovering a mysterious artifact buried beneath the Lunar surface, a spacecraft is sent to Jupiter to find its origins - a spacecraft manned by two men and the supercomputer H.A.L. 9000.

items.title: Oldeuboi
items.overview: After being kidnapped and imprisoned for fifteen years, Oh Dae-Su is released, only to find that he must find his captor in five days.

items.title: Dr. Strangelove or: How I Learned to Stop Worrying and Love the Bomb
items.overview: An insane American general orders a bombing attack on the Soviet Union, triggering a path to nuclear holocaust that a war room full of politicians and generals frantically tries to stop.

items.title: Mononoke-hime
items.overview: On a journey to find the cure for a Tatarigami's curse, Ashitaka finds himself in the middle of a war between the forest gods and Tatara, a mining colony. In this quest he also meets San, the Mononoke Hime.

items.title: Jagten
items.overview: A teacher lives a lonely life, all the while struggling over his son's custody. His life slowly gets better as he finds love and receives good news from his son, but his new luck is about to be brutally shattered by an innocent li...

items.title: Once Upon a Time in America
items.overview: A former Prohibition-era Jewish gangster returns to the Lower East Side of Manhattan 35 years later, where he must once again confront the ghosts and regrets of his old life.

items.title: North by Northwest
items.overview: A New York City advertising executive goes on the run after being mistaken for a government agent by a group of foreign spies, and falls for a woman whose loyalties he begins to doubt.

items.title: Lawrence of Arabia
items.overview: The story of T.E. Lawrence, the English officer who successfully united and led the diverse, often warring, Arab tribes during World War I in order to fight the Turks.

items.title: Das Boot
items.overview: A German U-boat stalks the frigid waters of the North Atlantic as its young crew experience the sheer terror and claustrophobic life of a submariner in World War II.

items.title: Singin' in the Rain
items.overview: A silent film star falls for a chorus girl just as he and his delusionally jealous screen partner are trying to make the difficult transition to talking pictures in 1920s Hollywood.

items.title: Jodaeiye Nader az Simin
items.overview: A married couple are faced with a difficult decision - to improve the life of their child by moving to another country or to stay in Iran and look after a deteriorating parent who has Alzheimer's disease.

items.title: Incendies
items.overview: Twins journey to the Middle East to discover their family history and fulfill their mother's last wishes.

items.title: Dangal
items.overview: Former wrestler Mahavir Singh Phogat and his two wrestler daughters struggle towards glory at the Commonwealth Games in the face of societal oppression.

items.title: Taare Zameen Par
items.overview: An eight-year-old boy is thought to be a lazy trouble-maker, until the new art teacher has the patience and compassion to discover the real problem behind his struggles in school.

items.title: The Apartment
items.overview: A Manhattan insurance clerk tries to rise in his company by letting its executives use his apartment for trysts, but complications and a romance of his own ensue.

items.title: M - Eine Stadt sucht einen Mörder
items.overview: When the police in a German city are unable to catch a child-murderer, other criminals join in the manhunt.

items.title: Double Indemnity
items.overview: A Los Angeles insurance representative lets an alluring housewife seduce him into a scheme of insurance fraud and murder that arouses the suspicion of his colleague, an insurance investigator.

items.title: Hamilton
items.overview: The real life of one of America's foremost founding fathers and first Secretary of the Treasury, Alexander Hamilton. Captured live on Broadway from the Richard Rodgers Theater with the original Broadway cast.

items.title: Idi i smotri
items.overview: After finding an old rifle, a young boy joins the Soviet resistance movement against ruthless German forces and experiences the horrors of World War II.

items.title: Ikiru
items.overview: A bureaucrat tries to find meaning in his life after he discovers he has terminal cancer.

items.title: Judgment at Nuremberg
items.overview: In 1948, an American court in occupied Germany tries four Nazis judged for war crimes.

items.title: The Wolf of Wall Street
items.overview: Based on the true story of Jordan Belfort, from his rise to a wealthy stock-broker living the high life to his fall involving crime, corruption and the federal government.

items.title: Batman Begins
items.overview: After training with his mentor, Batman begins his fight to free crime-ridden Gotham City from corruption.

items.title: Shutter Island
items.overview: In 1954, a U.S. Marshal investigates the disappearance of a murderer who escaped from a hospital for the criminally insane.

items.title: The Truman Show
items.overview: An insurance salesman discovers his whole life is actually a reality TV show.

items.title: Kill Bill: Vol. 1
items.overview: After awakening from a four-year coma, a former assassin wreaks vengeance on the team of assassins who betrayed her.

items.title: Finding Nemo
items.overview: After his son is captured in the Great Barrier Reef and taken to Sydney, a timid clownfish sets out on a journey to bring him home.

items.title: No Country for Old Men
items.overview: Violence and mayhem ensue after a hunter stumbles upon a drug deal gone wrong and more than two million dollars in cash near the Rio Grande.

items.title: Jurassic Park
items.overview: A pragmatic paleontologist touring an almost complete theme park on an island in Central America is tasked with protecting a couple of kids after a power failure causes the park's cloned dinosaurs to run loose.

items.title: The Sixth Sense
items.overview: A frightened, withdrawn Philadelphia boy who communicates with spirits seeks the help of a disheartened child psychologist.

items.title: A Beautiful Mind
items.overview: After John Nash, a brilliant but asocial mathematician, accepts secret work in cryptography, his life takes a turn for the nightmarish.

items.title: Die Hard
items.overview: A New York City police officer tries to save his estranged wife and several others taken hostage by terrorists during a Christmas party at the Nakatomi Plaza in Los Angeles.

items.title: Taxi Driver
items.overview: A mentally unstable veteran works as a nighttime taxi driver in New York City, where the perceived decadence and sleaze fuels his urge for violent action.

items.title: Snatch
items.overview: Unscrupulous boxing promoters, violent bookmakers, a Russian gangster, incompetent amateur robbers and supposedly Jewish jewelers fight to track down a priceless stolen diamond.

items.title: A Clockwork Orange
items.overview: In the future, a sadistic gang leader is imprisoned and volunteers for a conduct-aversion experiment, but it doesn't go as planned.

items.title: Prisoners
items.overview: When Keller Dover's daughter and her friend go missing, he takes matters into his own hands as the police pursue multiple leads and the pressure mounts.

items.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
items.overview: In 1938, after his father Professor Henry Jones, Sr. goes missing while pursuing the Holy Grail, Professor Henry "Indiana" Jones, Jr. finds himself up against Adolf Hitler's Nazis again to stop them from obtaining its powers.

items.title: Top Gun: Maverick
items.overview: After thirty years, Maverick is still pushing the envelope as a top naval aviator, but must confront ghosts of his past when he leads TOP GUN's elite graduates on a mission that demands the ultimate sacrifice from those chosen to ...

items.title: Full Metal Jacket
items.overview: A pragmatic U.S. Marine observes the dehumanizing effects the Vietnam War has on his fellow recruits from their brutal boot camp training to the bloody street fighting in Hue.

April 6th, 1917. As an infantry battalion assembles to wage war deep in enemy territory, two soldiers are assigned to race against time and deliver a message that will stop 1,600 men from walking straight into a deadly trap.

items.title: El laberinto del fauno
items.overview: In the Falangist Spain of 1944, the bookish young stepdaughter of a sadistic army officer escapes into an eerie but captivating fantasy world.

items.title: There Will Be Blood
items.overview: A story of family, religion, hatred, oil and madness, focusing on a turn-of-the-century prospector in the early days of the business.

items.title: Green Book
items.overview: A working-class Italian-American bouncer becomes the driver for an African-American classical pianist on a tour of venues through the 1960s American South.

items.title: L.A. Confidential
items.overview: As corruption grows in 1950s Los Angeles, three policemen - one strait-laced, one brutal, and one sleazy - investigate a series of murders with their own brand of justice.

items.title: Casino
items.overview: A tale of greed, deception, money, power, and murder occur between two best friends: a mafia enforcer and a casino executive compete against each other over a gambling empire, and over a fast-living and fast-loving socialite.

items.title: The Thing
items.overview: A research team in Antarctica is hunted by a shape-shifting alien that assumes the appearance of its victims.

items.title: Hauru no ugoku shiro
items.overview: When an unconfident young woman is cursed with an old body by a spiteful witch, her only chance of breaking the spell lies with a self-indulgent yet insecure young wizard and his companions in his legged, walking castle.

items.title: Citizen Kane
items.overview: Following the death of publishing tycoon Charles Foster Kane, reporters scramble to uncover the meaning of his final utterance: 'Rosebud.'

items.title: Unforgiven
items.overview: Retired Old West gunslinger William Munny reluctantly takes on one last job, with the help of his old partner Ned Logan and a young man, The "Schofield Kid."

items.title: Vertigo
items.overview: A former San Francisco police detective juggles wrestling with his personal demons and becoming obsessed with the hauntingly beautiful woman he has been hired to trail, who may be deeply disturbed.

items.title: Der Untergang
items.overview: Traudl Junge, the final secretary for Adolf Hitler, tells of the Nazi dictator's final days in his Berlin bunker at the end of WWII.

items.title: Gone with the Wind
items.overview: The manipulative daughter of a Georgia plantation owner conducts a turbulent romance with a roguish profiteer during the American Civil War and Reconstruction periods.

items.title: To Kill a Mockingbird
items.overview: Atticus Finch, a widowed lawyer in Depression-era Alabama, defends a black man against an undeserved rape charge, and his children against prejudice.

items.title: Some Like It Hot
items.overview: After two male musicians witness a mob hit, they flee the state in an all-female band disguised as women, but further complications set in.

items.title: The Sting
items.overview: Two grifters team up to pull off the ultimate con.

items.title: Per qualche dollaro in più
items.overview: Two bounty hunters with the same intentions team up to track down an escaped Mexican outlaw.

items.title: The Elephant Man
items.overview: A Victorian surgeon rescues a heavily disfigured man who is mistreated while scraping a living as a side-show freak. Behind his monstrous façade, there is revealed a person of kindness, intelligence and sophistication.

items.title: The Great Escape
items.overview: Allied prisoners of war plan for several hundred of their number to escape from a German camp during World War II.

items.title: The Father
items.overview: A man refuses all assistance from his daughter as he ages. As he tries to make sense of his changing circumstances, he begins to doubt his loved ones, his own mind and even the fabric of his reality.

items.title: El secreto de sus ojos
items.overview: A retired legal counselor writes a novel hoping to find closure for one of his past unresolved homicide cases and for his unreciprocated love with his superior - both of which still haunt him decades later.

items.title: Klaus
items.overview: A simple act of kindness always sparks another, even in a frozen, faraway place. When Smeerensburg's new postman, Jesper, befriends toymaker Klaus, their gifts melt an age-old feud and deliver a sleigh full of holiday traditions.

items.title: Metropolis
items.overview: In a futuristic city sharply divided between the working class and the city planners, the son of the city's mastermind falls in love with a working-class prophet who predicts the coming of a savior to mediate their differences.

items.title: Ladri di biciclette
items.overview: In post-war Italy, a working-class man's bicycle is stolen, endangering his efforts to find work. He and his son set out to find it.

items.title: Ran
items.overview: In Medieval Japan, an elderly warlord retires, handing over his empire to his three sons. However, he vastly underestimates how the new-found power will corrupt them and cause them to turn on each other...and him.

items.title: All About Eve
items.overview: A seemingly timid but secretly ruthless ingénue insinuates herself into the lives of an aging Broadway star and her circle of theater friends.

items.title: The Kid
items.overview: The Tramp cares for an abandoned child, but events put their relationship in jeopardy.

items.title: Yôjinbô
items.overview: A crafty ronin comes to a town divided by two criminal gangs and decides to play them against each other to free the town.

items.title: The Treasure of the Sierra Madre
items.overview: Two down-on-their-luck Americans searching for work in 1920s Mexico convince an old prospector to help them mine for gold in the Sierra Madre Mountains.

items.title: Babam ve Oglum
items.overview: The family of a left-wing journalist is torn apart after the military coup of Turkey in 1980.

items.title: Bacheha-Ye aseman
items.overview: After a boy loses his sister's pair of shoes, he goes on a series of adventures in order to find them. When he can't, he tries a new way to "win" a new pair.

items.title: Pather Panchali
items.overview: Impoverished priest Harihar Ray, dreaming of a better life for himself and his family, leaves his rural Bengal village in search of work.

items.title: Dersu Uzala
items.overview: The Russian army sends an explorer on an expedition to the snowy Siberian wilderness where he makes friends with a seasoned local hunter.

items.title: Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl
items.overview: Blacksmith Will Turner teams up with eccentric pirate "Captain" Jack Sparrow to save his love, the governor's daughter, from Jack's former pirate allies, who are now undead.

items.title: V for Vendetta
items.overview: In a future British dystopian society, a shadowy freedom fighter, known only by the alias of "V", plots to overthrow the tyrannical government - with the help of a young woman.

items.title: Catch Me If You Can
items.overview: Barely 21 yet, Frank is a skilled forger who has passed as a doctor, lawyer and pilot. FBI agent Carl becomes obsessed with tracking down the con man, who only revels in the pursuit.

items.title: Mad Max: Fury Road
items.overview: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, a woman rebels against a tyrannical ruler in search for her homeland with the aid of a group of female prisoners, a psychotic worshiper, and a drifter named Max.

items.title: Gone Girl
items.overview: With his wife's disappearance having become the focus of an intense media circus, a man sees the spotlight turned on him when it's suspected that he may not be innocent.

items.title: Monsters, Inc.
items.overview: In order to power the city, monsters have to scare children so that they scream. However, the children are toxic to the monsters, and after a child gets through, two monsters realize things may not be what they think.

items.title: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows - Part 2
items.overview: Harry, Ron, and Hermione search for Voldemort's remaining Horcruxes in their effort to destroy the Dark Lord as the final battle rages on at Hogwarts.

items.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
items.overview: With Spider-Man's identity now revealed, Peter asks Doctor Strange for help. When a spell goes wrong, dangerous foes from other worlds start to appear, forcing Peter to discover what it truly means to be Spider-Man.

items.title: The Terminator
items.overview: A human soldier is sent from 2029 to 1984 to stop an almost indestructible cyborg killing machine, sent from the same year, which has been programmed to execute a young woman whose unborn son is the key to humanity's future salvat...

items.title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
items.overview: A writer encounters the owner of an aging high-class hotel, who tells him of his early years serving as a lobby boy in the hotel's glorious years under an exceptional concierge.

items.title: Ratatouille
items.overview: A rat who can cook makes an unusual alliance with a young kitchen worker at a famous Paris restaurant.

items.title: Logan
items.overview: In a future where mutants are nearly extinct, an elderly and weary Logan leads a quiet life. But when Laura, a mutant child pursued by scientists, comes to him for help, he must get her to safety.

items.title: The Big Lebowski
items.overview: Ultimate L.A. slacker Jeff "The Dude" Lebowski, mistaken for a millionaire of the same name, seeks restitution for a rug ruined by debt collectors, enlisting his bowling buddies for help while trying to find the millionaire's miss...

items.title: Inside Out
items.overview: After young Riley is uprooted from her Midwest life and moved to San Francisco, her emotions - Joy, Fear, Anger, Disgust and Sadness - conflict on how best to navigate a new city, house, and school.

items.title: How to Train Your Dragon
items.overview: A hapless young Viking who aspires to hunt dragons becomes the unlikely friend of a young dragon himself, and learns there may be more to the creatures than he assumed.

items.title: Blade Runner
items.overview: A blade runner must pursue and terminate four replicants who stole a ship in space and have returned to Earth to find their creator.

items.title: Gran Torino
items.overview: Disgruntled Korean War veteran Walt Kowalski sets out to reform his neighbor, Thao Lor, a Hmong teenager who tried to steal Kowalski's prized possession: a 1972 Gran Torino.

items.title: Fargo
items.overview: Minnesota car salesman Jerry Lundegaard's inept crime falls apart due to his and his henchmen's bungling and the persistent police work of the quite pregnant Marge Gunderson.

items.title: 12 Years a Slave
items.overview: In the antebellum United States, Solomon Northup, a free black man from upstate New York, is abducted and sold into slavery.

items.title: Trainspotting
items.overview: Renton, deeply immersed in the Edinburgh drug scene, tries to clean up and get out, despite the allure of the drugs and influence of friends.

items.title: Million Dollar Baby
items.overview: A determined woman works with a hardened boxing trainer to become a professional.

items.title: Jaws
items.overview: When a killer shark unleashes chaos on a beach community off Cape Cod, it's up to a local sheriff, a marine biologist, and an old seafarer to hunt the beast down.

items.title: Rocky
items.overview: A small-time Philadelphia boxer gets a supremely rare chance to fight the world heavyweight champion in a bout in which he strives to go the distance for his self-respect.

items.title: Hacksaw Ridge
items.overview: World War II American Army Medic Desmond T. Doss, who served during the Battle of Okinawa, refuses to kill people and becomes the first man in American history to receive the Medal of Honor without firing a shot.

items.title: Dead Poets Society
items.overview: Maverick teacher John Keating uses poetry to embolden his boarding school students to new heights of self-expression.

items.title: Lock, Stock and Two Smoking Barrels
items.overview: Eddy persuades his three pals to pool money for a vital poker game against a powerful local mobster, Hatchet Harry. Eddy loses, after which Harry gives him a week to pay back 500,000 pounds.

items.title: Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri
items.overview: A mother personally challenges the local authorities to solve her daughter's murder when they fail to catch the culprit.

items.title: Monty Python and the Holy Grail
items.overview: King Arthur and his Knights of the Round Table embark on a surreal, low-budget search for the Holy Grail, encountering many, very silly obstacles.

items.title: Ford v Ferrari
items.overview: American car designer Carroll Shelby and driver Ken Miles battle corporate interference and the laws of physics to build a revolutionary race car for Ford in order to defeat Ferrari at the 24 Hours of Le Mans in 1966.

items.title: Rush
items.overview: The merciless 1970s rivalry between Formula One rivals James Hunt and Niki Lauda.

items.title: Spotlight
items.overview: The true story of how the Boston Globe uncovered the massive scandal of child molestation and cover-up within the local Catholic Archdiocese, shaking the entire Catholic Church to its core.

items.title: Warrior
items.overview: The youngest son of an alcoholic former boxer returns home, where he's trained by his father for competition in a mixed martial arts tournament - a path that puts the fighter on a collision course with his estranged, older brother.

items.title: The Help
items.overview: An aspiring author during the civil rights movement of the 1960s decides to write a book detailing the African American maids' point of view on the white families for which they work, and the hardships they go through on a daily b...

items.title: The Exorcist
items.overview: When a teenage girl is possessed by a mysterious entity, her mother seeks the help of two priests to save her daughter.

items.title: Stand by Me
items.overview: After the death of one of his friends, a writer recounts a childhood journey with his friends to find the body of a missing boy.

items.title: Room
items.overview: Held captive for 7 years in an enclosed space, a woman and her young son finally gain their freedom, allowing the boy to experience the outside world for the first time.

items.title: Platoon
items.overview: Chris Taylor, a neophyte recruit in Vietnam, finds himself caught in a battle of wills between two sergeants, one good and the other evil. A shrewd examination of the brutality of war and the duality of man in conflict.

items.title: The Wizard of Oz
items.overview: Young Dorothy Gale and her dog Toto are swept away by a tornado from their Kansas farm to the magical Land of Oz, and embark on a quest with three new friends to see the Wizard, who can return her to her home and fulfill the other...

items.title: Tonari no Totoro
items.overview: When two girls move to the country to be near their ailing mother, they have adventures with the wondrous forest spirits who live nearby.

items.title: Raging Bull
items.overview: The life of boxer Jake LaMotta, whose violence and temper that led him to the top in the ring destroyed his life outside of it.

items.title: Hotel Rwanda
items.overview: Paul Rusesabagina, a hotel manager, houses over a thousand Tutsi refugees during their struggle against the Hutu militia in Rwanda, Africa.

items.title: The Deer Hunter
items.overview: An in-depth examination of the ways in which the Vietnam War impacts and disrupts the lives of several friends in a small steel mill town in Pennsylvania.

items.title: Chinatown
items.overview: A private detective hired to expose an adulterer in 1930s Los Angeles finds himself caught up in a web of deceit, corruption, and murder.

items.title: Before Sunrise
items.overview: A young man and woman meet on a train in Europe, and wind up spending one evening together in Vienna. Unfortunately, both know that this will probably be their only night together.

items.title: Hachi: A Dog's Tale
items.overview: A college professor bonds with an abandoned dog he takes into his home.

items.title: Before Sunset
items.overview: Nine years after Jesse and Celine first met, they encounter each other again on the French leg of Jesse's book tour.

items.title: The Sound of Music
items.overview: A young novitiate is sent by her convent in 1930s Austria to become a governess to the seven children of a widowed naval officer.

items.title: Ben-Hur
items.overview: After a Jewish prince is betrayed and sent into slavery by a Roman friend in 1st-century Jerusalem, he regains his freedom and comes back for revenge.

items.title: Salinui chueok
items.overview: In a small Korean province in 1986, two detectives struggle with the case of multiple young women being found raped and murdered by an unknown culprit.

items.title: The Iron Giant
items.overview: A young boy befriends a giant robot from outer space that a paranoid government agent wants to destroy.

items.title: The Bridge on the River Kwai
items.overview: British POWs are forced to build a railway bridge across the river Kwai for their Japanese captors in occupied Burma, not knowing that the allied forces are planning a daring commando raid through the jungle to destroy it.

items.title: Relatos salvajes
items.overview: Six short stories that explore the extremities of human behavior involving people in distress.

items.title: La haine
items.overview: 24 hours in the lives of three young men in the French suburbs the day after a violent riot.

items.title: Det sjunde inseglet
items.overview: A knight returning to Sweden after the Crusades seeks answers about life, death, and the existence of God as he plays chess against the Grim Reaper during the Black Plague.

items.title: Dial M for Murder
items.overview: A former tennis star arranges the murder of his adulterous wife.

items.title: Barry Lyndon
items.overview: An Irish rogue wins the heart of a rich widow and assumes her dead husband's aristocratic position in 18th-century England.

items.title: Ah-ga-ssi
items.overview: A woman is hired as a handmaiden to a Japanese heiress, but secretly she is involved in a plot to defraud her.

items.title: In the Name of the Father
items.overview: A man's coerced confession to an I.R.A. bombing he did not commit results in the imprisonment of his father as well. An English lawyer fights to free them.

items.title: Mary and Max.
items.overview: A tale of friendship between two unlikely pen pals: Mary, a lonely, eight-year-old girl living in the suburbs of Melbourne, and Max, a forty-four-year old, severely obese man living in New York.

items.title: Rashômon
items.overview: The rape of a bride and the murder of her samurai husband are recalled from the perspectives of a bandit, the bride, the samurai's ghost and a woodcutter.

items.title: The Third Man
items.overview: Pulp novelist Holly Martins travels to shadowy, postwar Vienna, only to find himself investigating the mysterious death of an old friend, Harry Lime.

items.title: Network
items.overview: A television network cynically exploits a deranged former anchor's ravings and revelations about the news media for its own profit, but finds that his message may be difficult to control.

items.title: On the Waterfront
items.overview: An ex-prize fighter turned New Jersey longshoreman struggles to stand up to his corrupt union bosses, including his older brother, as he starts to connect with the grieving sister of one of the syndicate's victims.

items.title: Rebecca
items.overview: A self-conscious woman juggles adjusting to her new role as an aristocrat's wife and avoiding being intimidated by his first wife's spectral presence.

items.title: Mr. Smith Goes to Washington
items.overview: A naive youth leader is appointed to fill a vacancy in the U.S. Senate. His idealistic plans promptly collide with corruption at home and subterfuge from his hero in Washington, but he tries to forge ahead despite attacks on his c...

items.title: The Gold Rush
items.overview: A prospector goes to the Klondike during the 1890s gold rush in hopes of making his fortune, and is smitten with a girl he sees in a dance hall.

items.title: Smultronstället
items.overview: After living a life marked by coldness, an aging professor is forced to confront the emptiness of his existence.

items.title: It Happened One Night
items.overview: A renegade reporter trailing a young runaway heiress for a big story joins her on a bus heading from Florida to New York, and they end up stuck with each other when the bus leaves them behind at one of the stops.

items.title: The Grapes of Wrath
items.overview: An Oklahoma family, driven off their farm by the poverty and hopelessness of the Dust Bowl, joins the westward migration to California, suffering the misfortunes of the homeless in the Great Depression.

items.title: The General
items.overview: After being rejected by the Confederate military, not realizing it was due to his crucial civilian role, an engineer must single-handedly recapture his beloved locomotive after it is seized by Union spies and return it through ene...

items.title: Tôkyô monogatari
items.overview: An old couple visit their children and grandchildren in the city, but receive little attention.

items.title: The Best Years of Our Lives
items.overview: Three World War II veterans, two of them traumatized or disabled, return home to the American midwest to discover that they and their families have been irreparably changed.

items.title: La battaglia di Algeri
items.overview: In the 1950s, fear and violence escalate as the people of Algiers fight for independence from the French government.

items.title: Le salaire de la peur
items.overview: In a decrepit South American village, four men are hired to transport an urgent nitroglycerine shipment without the equipment that would make it safe.

items.title: La passion de Jeanne d'Arc
items.overview: In 1431, Jeanne d'Arc is placed on trial on charges of heresy. The ecclesiastical jurists attempt to force Jeanne to recant her claims of holy visions.

items.title: Sherlock Jr.
items.overview: A film projectionist longs to be a detective, and puts his meagre skills to work when he is framed by a rival for stealing his girlfriend's father's pocketwatch.

items.title: To Be or Not to Be
items.overview: During the Nazi occupation of Poland, an acting troupe becomes embroiled in a Polish soldier's efforts to track down a German spy.

items.title: The Incredibles
items.overview: While trying to lead a quiet suburban life, a family of undercover superheroes are forced into action to save the world.

items.title: Groundhog Day
items.overview: A narcissistic, self-centered weatherman finds himself in a time loop on Groundhog Day, and the day keeps repeating until he gets it right.

items.title: Into the Wild
items.overview: After graduating from Emory University, top student and athlete Christopher McCandless abandons his possessions, gives his entire $24,000 savings account to charity and hitchhikes to Alaska to live in the wilderness. Along the way...

items.title: Aladdin
items.overview: A kindhearted street urchin and a power-hungry Grand Vizier vie for a magic lamp that has the power to make their deepest wishes come true.

items.title: Life of Brian
items.overview: Born on the original Christmas in the stable next door to Jesus Christ, Brian of Nazareth spends his life being mistaken for a messiah.

items.title: Amores perros
items.overview: A horrific car accident connects three stories, each involving characters dealing with loss, regret, and life's harsh realities, all in the name of love.

items.title: Gandhi
items.overview: The life of the lawyer who became the famed leader of the Indian revolts against the British rule through his philosophy of nonviolent protest.

items.title: Cool Hand Luke
items.overview: A laid back Southern man is sentenced to two years in a rural prison, but refuses to conform.

items.title: Persona
items.overview: A nurse is put in charge of a mute actress and finds that their personae are melding together.

items.title: Les quatre cents coups
items.overview: A young boy, left without attention, delves into a life of petty crime.

items.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
items.overview: An aging Chinese immigrant is swept up in an insane adventure, in which she alone can save the world by exploring other universes connecting with the lives she could have led.
